task_ipc.open_requires_one_target: Open command requires exactly one target path.

archive_warning.native_start_failed: 7zFM failed to start the macOS archive drag session.
archive_warning.session_timeout: The macOS archive drag session timed out before completion.
archive_warning.target_did_not_request_promise: The drop target did not request archive data from 7zFM.
archive_warning.promise_requested_but_no_write: The drop target accepted the archive drag, but 7zFM did not complete every promised file write.
archive_warning.direct_export_failed: The drop target requested archive data, but 7zFM failed while directly exporting archive content.
archive_warning.materialization_failed: The drop target requested archive data, but 7zFM failed while materializing temporary files for the drag.
archive_warning.canceled: The archive drag-out was canceled after the drop target requested archive data.
archive_warning.not_accepted: The drop target did not accept archive drag-out from 7zFM.
